shield.name: Magic Shield
shield.tooltip: Negates ALL damage from one attack or effect, then disappears. No ZMK draw.

frozen.name: Frozen
frozen.tooltip: Cannot attack and deals no counter damage. Ends at the start of the owner's next turn.

stunned.name: Stunned
stunned.tooltip: Cannot attack. Ends at the start of the owner's next turn.

burning.name: Burning
burning.tooltip: Takes 1 base damage at the start of the owner's turn. Persists until removed by an effect.

poisoned.name: Poisoned
poisoned.tooltip: Takes 1 base damage at the start of the owner's turn; attacks at disadvantage (ZMK). Persists until removed by an effect.

silenced.name: Silenced
silenced.tooltip: Loses ALL effects, keywords and buffs — stats revert to the base card. Irreversible.

blessed.name: Blessed
blessed.tooltip: This creature's next attack has advantage — 2 ZMK are drawn and the better one is used. Consumed on attack.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.tooltip: The enemy cannot target this creature until it attacks.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.tooltip: Enemy creatures must attack this creature first.

sprint.name: Sprint
sprint.tooltip: Can attack the turn it is summoned.

control.name: Mind Control
control.tooltip: The creature is temporarily controlled by the opponent. It returns to its owner when the duration ends.

cantAttack.name: Cannot Attack
cantAttack.tooltip: An aura prevents this creature from attacking while the aura source is on the board.

immortal.name: Immortal
immortal.tooltip: Cannot die — HP never drops below 1 while the aura source is on the board.
